bad_audience_reject.error_message: JWT aud mismatch: got [https://highflame.ai], expected to contain https://payment-processor.invalid

naive_middleware_results.comment: No token / signature / aud / exp / scope concept; substitution still binds the session subject.

honest_verdict: ZeroID rejects earlier (at the resource-server boundary). On the AP2 Vault Whisper substrate, the security outcome is the same in both arms because substitution closes the cross-account read structurally, regardless of token plumbing. The substrate is too thin to differentiate Vault on aud / exp / signature. Scope confinement is where the OAuth2 machinery actually pays.
